whatWeOffer.label: WHAT WE OFFER
whatWeOffer.title: A Seamless Supply Chain
whatWeOffer.subtitle: We can ease your procurement from India
whatWeOffer.description: We offer an extremely wide range of stocked standard fasteners, and we specialize in trading with any imaginable C-parts according to your unique needs. It could be turned, injected, extruded, stamped, forged, milled, molded, or even assembled. All parts of our offer are based on years of experience in making a difference for you.

footer.description: Your trusted Sourcing Office in India, backed by experienced professionals delivering quality industrial solutions.
footer.disclaimer: SHARDUL-GE Technologies is an independently owned, family-managed enterprise. "SHARDUL" represents the founding family identity and "GE" honours Gouri & Esha — symbolising generational continuity and vision.

hero.title: Industrial Solutionist...
hero.description: Your trusted sourcing office in India backed with experienced professionals delivering quality industrial solutions.

whoWeAre.label: OUR STORY
whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.paragraph1: We are your trusted sourcing partner in India, supported by a team of experienced Global Supply Chain Management (SCM) professionals committed to simplifying procurement and ensuring consistent quality.
whoWeAre.paragraph2: Our capabilities cover a wide range of products including fasteners, plastics, sheet metal components, turned parts, sub-assemblies, and more. We support customers from prototype development to bulk production, offering flexibility at every stage.
whoWeAre.paragraph3: We collaborate exclusively with carefully audited, best-in-class suppliers who comply with international business standards and strict confidentiality requirements.
whoWeAre.paragraph4: By taking full ownership of quality, cost, and timelines, we provide cost-effective sourcing solutions and long-term price contract options.

ourName.label: THE NAME BEHIND THE BRAND
ourName.title: A Family Legacy,
ourName.paragraph1: SHARDUL-GE Technologies has been shaped through years of consistent effort, guided by principles that emphasize integrity, responsibility, and long-term value creation.
ourName.paragraph2: SHARDUL-GE Technologies operates as an independently owned and family-managed business. The name "SHARDUL" represents the founding family identity, while "GE" reflects Gouri and Esha—symbolizing continuity and future orientation.
ourName.paragraph3: The organization's approach is defined by precision, reliability, and long-term thinking. From its origins as a closely held family initiative to its evolution into a professionally managed enterprise serving a global clientele.
